name: Discord Integration
description: Bridges Minecraft server events to Discord — chat relay, join/leave notifications, whitelist request approvals
author: pruefertit

configurable.label: Discord Bot Token
configurable.description: Token from the Discord Developer Portal (Bot → Token)

configurable.label: Discord Application / Client ID
configurable.description: Application ID from the Discord Developer Portal (General Information)

configurable.label: Discord Public Key
configurable.description: Public key for interaction signature verification (General Information → Public Key)

configurable.label: Aethera Internal URL
configurable.description: Internal URL of the Aethera app (used for log polling and whitelist callbacks)

configurable.label: Aethera Internal API Key
configurable.description: Shared secret used to authenticate requests between this module and Aethera. Leave empty to rely on Docker-network isolation only (less secure).

permissions.name: module.discord.*
permissions.description: Full access to the Discord integration module
